channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ plans 'Truth and Justice Commission' to compensate allies: Sources
item.description: The Justice Department is finalizing a deal to create a commission that would pay claims from alleged victims of government weaponization.

item.title: Republican Senator Cassidy faces tough Louisiana primary challenge
item.description: Louisiana voters head to the polls Saturday for Senate primaries, with incumbent Bill Cassidy battling a Trump-backed opponent.

item.title: Long Island Rail Road workers go on strike after failing to reach new contract
item.description: The strike follows a breakdown in negotiations for a new four-year contract. The MTA and unions agreed on the first three years but could not finalize the remaining terms.

item.title: Trump says U.S. has killed Islamic State leader in Nigeria
item.description: President Trump announced Friday that U.S. and Nigerian forces killed Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, an Islamic State leader.
